backend/main.mo: Main backend actor implementing user profiles, note management with blob storage, study groups, quizzes, viva questions, Stripe integration, and role-based access control with admin and premium user features.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting three logo replacement tasks: replacing the logo file, updating Layout.tsx references, and updating SplashScreen.tsx references to use the graduation cap emblem image.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend files including components, pages, hooks, and styling, describing routing, authentication, profile management, note browsing, study groups, and payment flows.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color system defining CSS variables for light and dark themes, including primary, secondary, accent, and chart colors with sidebar and border styling.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React application with viewport meta tag and root div mounting the app from main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component configuring TanStack Router with all routes (dashboard, upload, browse, notes, quiz, viva, groups, profile, admin, payment), splash screen, and profile setup modal logic.
frontend/src/components/DashboardCard.ts: Reusable dashboard card component with icon, title, description, gradient background, and hover effects for quick-access navigation tiles.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Hero banner component displaying a generated hero image with gradient overlay and headline promoting AI-powered study features.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout component with responsive header navigation, graduation cap logo, conditional admin link, mobile menu, user profile display, and footer with caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: A button component that toggles between login and logout states using Internet Identity, with loading states and error handling for authentication flows.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal form component for new users to set up their profile with name, email, and college fields, displayed on first login.
frontend/src/components/SplashScreen.tsx: An animated splash screen component that displays the app logo with fade-in/hold/fade-out transitions before calling onComplete callback.
frontend/src/components/SubscriptionCard: Displays free and premium subscription tiers with feature comparisons and handles Stripe checkout session creation for premium upgrades.
frontend/src/components/UserProfileDispl: Shows authenticated user's avatar, name, college, and premium badge in a compact display component.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages the backend actor instance with authentication, handling both anonymous and authenticated states, and invalidates dependent queries on actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCreateCheckoutSess: A mutation hook that creates a Stripe checkout session for shopping items with success and cancel URLs.
frontend/src/hooks/useCreateStudyGroup.t: A mutation hook for creating study groups with id, name, and description, invalidating study group queries on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetAdminUserProfil: A query hook that fetches the admin user profile from the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetAllUsers.ts: A query hook that fetches all user profiles, typically for admin purposes.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCallerUserProfi: A query hook that fetches the currently authenticated user's profile from the backend.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context and hooks, managing login/logout state, identity persistence, and delegation validity checks.
frontend/src/hooks/useIsStripeConfigured: A query hook that checks whether Stripe payment integration is configured on the backend.
frontend/src/hooks/useJoinStudyGroup.ts: A mutation hook for joining a study group by ID, invalidating related study group queries on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports React Query hooks for fetching notes by subject, individual notes, study groups, quizzes, and viva questions using the actor from useActor.
frontend/src/hooks/useSaveCallerUserProf: Provides a mutation hook to save the current user's profile and invalidates the currentUserProfile query cache on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useSaveQuiz.ts: Provides a mutation hook to save quiz questions by ID and invalidates the quiz query cache on success.
Provides a mutation hook to save viva questions for a subject and invalidates the vivaQuestions query cache on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useSearchUsersByEmail: Provides a debounced query hook (300ms) to search users by email, returning empty array if search term is empty.
frontend/src/hooks/useSetUserAdminStatus: Provides a mutation hook to set a user's admin status by principal and invalidates allUsers, currentUserProfile, and adminUserProfile caches.
frontend/src/hooks/useSetUserPremiumStat: Provides a mutation hook to set a user's premium status by principal and invalidates allUsers and currentUserProfile caches.
frontend/src/hooks/useUploadNote.ts: Provides a mutation hook to upload notes with metadata and file content converted to ExternalBlob, invalidating notes cache on success.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind CSS configuration with a purple-blue gradient theme for light and dark modes, including custom utilities for glow effects, animations, and glassmorphism.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query, Internet Identity provider, and renders the App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboardPage.ts: Admin dashboard page for managing users, toggling premium and admin status, with search functionality and access control based on admin profile.
frontend/src/pages/BrowseNotesPage.tsx: Page for browsing and searching notes by subject, topic, or college with filtering and download functionality.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Main dashboard page displaying hero section, user greeting with premium status, navigation cards for key features, and subscription plans.
frontend/src/pages/GroupDetailPage.tsx: Displays details of a specific study group including name, description, and member list with loading and error states. Provides navigation back to the groups list.
frontend/src/pages/NoteDetailPage.tsx: Shows detailed information about a specific note including metadata (subject, semester, college) and provides download functionality plus AI study tool buttons (summary, quiz, viva). Includes navigation back to browse page.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentFailurePage.ts: Displays a payment failure message with options to retry payment or return to dashboard. Shows error icon and user-friendly messaging.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentSuccessPage.ts: Confirms successful premium subscription payment and lists premium benefits (unlimited uploads, AI capabilities, priority support, analytics). Provides navigation to dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/ProfilePage.tsx: User profile management page allowing authenticated users to view and edit personal information including name, email, college, bio, year of study, and department. Includes form validation and character limits.
frontend/src/pages/QuizPage.tsx: Placeholder page for quiz generation feature that displays a message indicating the feature requires premium subscription and external AI integration. Provides navigation back to note details or browse.
frontend/src/pages/StudyGroupsPage.tsx: Lists study groups and provides a form to create new groups with name and description. Handles group creation and navigation to newly created group details.
frontend/src/pages/UploadNotePage.tsx: Form for uploading notes with file selection (PDF/DOC/images up to 10MB) and metadata fields (subject, topic, semester, college). Shows free tier limitations and handles note upload submission.
frontend/src/pages/VivaPage.tsx: React page component that displays a placeholder for viva question generation feature, showing a message that it requires premium subscription and AI integration, with navigation back to browse page.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module for extracting and managing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support for maintaining state across navigation.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color scheme using OKLCH color space, extended border radius values, custom shadows (glow effects), and animations for accordion and floating elements.
project_state.json: Project metadata file documenting Student Vibe application architecture, features (authentication, notes sharing, AI study tools, premium subscriptions), and implementation status with React frontend and Internet Identity authentication.
